---
title: "Statistical Theory II"
toc: false
---

- [Homework 5](../../Homeworks_GradSchool/Theory2/slater-hw5.pdf)
- [Homework 6](../../Homeworks_GradSchool/Theory2/slater_hw6.pdf)
- [Homework 7](../../Homeworks_GradSchool/Theory2/slater_hw7.pdf)
- [Homework 8](../../Homeworks_GradSchool/Theory2/slater_hw8.pdf)
